title: Leashable Fences
description: Leashable Fences is a plugin designed for building and allows the player to leash fences together.
body:
# Leashable Fences

### What is Leashable Fences?
- Leashable Fences is a small plugin designed to allow the ability for players to be able to leash fences together.

### How do I leash fences?
- You can use leash fences together by right clicking on a fence with a leash before right clickng on fence you want to connect to.

**!!!When connecting fences that have already been connected you must keep in mind you need to click the fence below the leash hitch and not the leash hitch!!!**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/991212603ade6ffe66605437960688808c28eb02_0.webp)
